boundary: Start window version switcher popup using shared popup template.

inputs.activeVersionId: current selected main window version id
inputs.onSelectVersion: parent callback to apply selected version

outputs.selection: click, Enter, or Space calls onSelectVersion(version.id)
outputs.close: select, X, Esc, or outside click calls onClose

rules: Use listbox + div role=option; do not put role=option on button.
Use roving tabindex; one option has tabindex=0.
ArrowUp and ArrowDown move one row at a time.
Selecting a version closes popup through parent callback.
Do not duplicate close callbacks after select.

expected.open: popup visible with active version row focused
expected.ArrowDown: activeIndex increments by 1 until last row
expected.ArrowUp: activeIndex decrements by 1 until first row
expected.select: onSelectVersion called once, onClose called once
expected.xClose: Dialog.Close closes via Bits Dialog state and onClose parent callback
expected.escClose: Esc closes via Bits Dialog state and onClose parent callback
expected.outsideClose: outside click closes via Bits Dialog state and onClose parent callback

proof.notCheckedHere: pnpm check and runtime UI proof must be run in local repo.
